_comment: Fail-closed Box scope guard. EVERY Box CLI/REST/SDK or tools/box wrapper operation must stay within test folder 392761581105 and tracked descendants. Folder 0 is always denied. The former liveReady production bypass is retired; changing mode/root or adding liveReady=true makes the guard deny Box operations. A future production cutover requires TKT-178's separately reviewed signed-run exact-object executor, never this generic test harness.
